CREATE TABLE test_table (a DateTime, b DateTime);
SELECT minus(a, b) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE numbers (num1 Int32, num2 Int32);
INSERT INTO numbers VALUES (10, 5), (20, 15), (30, 10);
SELECT num1, num2, minus(num1, num2) AS difference FROM numbers;
SELECT (SELECT minus(2023, 2020) AS year_diff) AS year_difference;
CREATE TABLE dates (start_date Date, end_date Date);
INSERT INTO dates VALUES ('2023-01-01', '2023-12-31');
SELECT minus(end_date, start_date) FROM dates;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id Int32, timestamp DateTime, value Float64);
SELECT id, minus(timestamp, (SELECT min(timestamp) FROM complex_table)) AS time_diff FROM complex_table;
CREATE TABLE join_table1 (id Int32, value1 Int32);
CREATE TABLE join_table2 (id Int32, value2 Int32);
INSERT INTO join_table1 VALUES (1, 100), (2, 200);
INSERT INTO join_table2 VALUES (1, 50), (2, 80);
SELECT j1.id, minus(j1.value1, j2.value2) AS value_diff FROM join_table1 j1 JOIN join_table2 j2 ON j1.id = j2.id;
CREATE TABLE nested_query (a Int32, b Int32);
INSERT INTO nested_query VALUES (5, 3), (10, 6);
SELECT (SELECT minus(a, b) FROM nested_query) AS result FROM nested_query LIMIT 1;
